# Qor-logic repository instructions

Follow `AGENTS.md` and
`qor/references/doctrine-publication-boundary.md`.

Qor-logic is public and standalone. Delete or anonymize direct references to
repositories outside Qor-logic before producing code, comments, tests,
documentation, issues, pull requests, or release text. Outside repositories may
inform private reasoning only. The sole exception is a deliberate, public-safe
record under `docs/Lessons-Learned/`.
